---
title: "Generalized Linear Models and Extensions"
subtitle: "BIO-001 | Track A — Biostatistics"
description: "The workhorse models of applied biostatistics: regression models for non-normal response data with rigorous theory of estimation, inference, and model checking."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Generalized Linear Models and Extensions

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
